textByHashes.dd330a04316a578140197383cb6672c12dc91a23: Well, you have come to the right person, then - I researched exotic plant diseases as part of my druidic training. What is the affliction that you need to cure?
textByHashes.5125d8ada0848a945b3e3082ee9ce62893bbd9f8: Ah, so is this the famous Burthorpe Vine?
textByHashes.241e36bfa62d19e2d61b41cc89b6174ab0ff4f6d: I'm afraid that my researches did not extend to Burthorpe Vine. Bernald and his ancestors have always closely guarded their heritage, that vine. In fact, I'm surprised that he has involved you.
textByHashes.8bc6ec767d045790313acbe79b484c76e291cfaf: I see. Well, if it involves some unnatural power I would rather not know. I prefer the use of power that can be brought forth from the plants around us.
textByHashes.25a5bffcd64d82d5178521b601127fc83b5279a6: There is one thing you could try. One of the most potent cures I have discovered involves using the natural power held within a very special mineral, but it is a very closely guarded secret.
textByHashes.6c4797cb02c56162aafca86565a190602f460cb8: You know of that?!? Then I can do no further harm here. You can make a potent plant cure by mixing some crumbled rune essence into a normal plant cure. This may possibly cure Bernald's vines.
textByHashes.2b85a145a7df69d11f7d3ebe9ef96ad2613c3b47: This is the power you are abusing!! I feel it now - it emanates from the ring you wear, a festering fountain of corruption that appalls my very soul!!!
textByHashes.582eae5c603a046de6c1e12574498a5c789b2020: You, , are the one who must be weak- minded, if you consider using such a dreadful weapon. Beware - it may one day be your downfall.
